title: Resolution Authorizing Honorable Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Boy Scouts of the Philippines Makiling Camp Regarding the Lease of Vargas Hall to Be Used As Isolation Facility for Covid-19 Patients of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 06/21/2021)
